mapper.select: SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, description, teacher_id, hours, fee, target_grade, subject, teach_mode, location, valid_start, valid_end, class_time_desc, max_students, enrolled_count, suitable_age, highlights, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{teacherId}, #{hours}, #{fee}, #{targetGrade}, #{subject}, #{teachMode}, #{location}, #{validStart}, #{validEnd}, #{classTimeDesc}, #{maxStudents}, #{enrolledCount}, #{suitableAge}, #{highlights}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET enrolled_count = enrolled_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND (max_students = 0 OR max_students IS NULL OR enrolled_count < max_students)
